title: uentcreo
text: uentcreo Create an occurrence of an entity parameter, and make it current. long uentcreo (UHACT hEnt, long occNr ); Parameters hEnt The handle to the entity parameter (which must be of type OUT or INOUT ). occNr Sequence number of the new occurrence. Return Values For more information, see the "Call-In API Return Codes" topic. Use Library: ucall Description uentcreo creates a new occurrence of an entity parameter, and make it current. Note that it cannot be used with an occurrence parameter. This function is very similar to the ProcScript function creocc . In particular, it follows the same rules for the sequence number occNr . Refer to the creocc ProcScript statement for additional information. Example: uentcreo, uentremo, uentseto The following example uses uentcreo to create 20 occurrences of an entity parameter, and then calls uentremo to remove every other occurrence, so that only the even-numbered occurrences remain. It then activates the operation SETENT in service ENTSRV, that prints the even-numbered occurrences to the message frame. The entity ENT is defined with the following: PK CHAR(3) REC CHAR(20) Copy Operation SETENT is defined as follows: Explain this code operation setent params entity ent : in; endparams $1 = 1 setocc "ent", $1 while ( $status >= 0 ) putmess "pk = %%pk rec = %%rec" $1 = $1 + 1 setocc "ent", $1 endwhile return 0 end Copy The following is the 3GL code: Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> void set_ent () { UHACT hEnv, hIn; /* Environment and instance handle */ UHACT hOp, hEnt; /* Operation and entity handles */ long actStatus, procErr; /* Activation status and procerr */ int i; /* Occurrence loop counter */ char s1[80]; /* Work string */ ueopen(&hEnv;) /* Get environment handle */ uinstnew (hEnv, (UCHAR *)"ENTSRV", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, &procErr);/*Instantiate service ENTSRV */ uinstopr (hIn, (UCHAR *)"SETENT", 0, &hOp);/*Instantiate operation SETENT */ uprmgeth(hOp, 1, 0, &hEnt); /* Get entity handle for ENT parameter */ for ( i=1 ; i<=20; i++ ) /* Do 20 occurrences */ { uentcreo(hEnt, -1); /* Add occurrence at the end */ sprintf(s1, "%d", i); /* Generate PK data */ ustr2uf(hEnt, 1, s1); /* Fill PK */ sprintf(s1, "Record %d", i);/* Generate REC data */ ustr2uf(hEnt, 2, s1); /* Fill REC */ } for ( i=1; /* Delete every other occurrence */ uentremo(hEnt, i)==UACT_SUCCESS; i++ ); uopract (hOp, &actStatus, &procErr); /* Activate ENTSRV */ uinstdel (hIn, 0); /* Delete ENTSRV instance */ ufreeh (&hOp;) /* Free SETENT operation handle */ ufreeh (&hIn;) /* Free ENTSRV instance handle */ ufreeh (&hEnv;) /* Free environment handle */ } Copy Related Links Call-In API Return Codes Codes that can possibly be returned by functions from the 3GL call-in API are consistent with the values returned by the ProcScript function $procerror, unless noted otherwise.
